title: cyclosorus atrospinosus
intro: Cyclosorus atrospinosus, also known as the Atrospinosus Lopholepis fern, is a species of fern native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyclosorus atrospinosus include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce swelling and pain, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use.
